reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this app!! Hands down one of the best for me!! I do A LOT of TurboFire and this takes its place when I'm traveling with my Quest. It's great to use at home and on the go!!!

Pretty simple setup but can still be entertaining if not a workout. There’s a short break to catch your breath if needed built into each session I tried.  I don’t want a break in a short session, but I don’t see how to tell it to just keep going,so I never really get my pulse up like I want.
Also I can’t find a way to adjust for my height. I often play seated due to mobility issues but even setting up in stationary before starting the app it still places a lot of the targets too high for me to hit properly. The overhead punches are too high for me even if standing!

I do like the “ play against	AI or others” options.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We’ve fixed the height issue—it's now dynamic and auto-adjusts even if you’re seated. Also, if you want a no-break mode, try Boss Challenge.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this, it’s a great workout especially if you like punching. It’s absolutely worth paying for! 🫶🏻
Some hits dont connect correctly
We got this app for multiplayer use and it sucks, we cannot workout with each other, it always pairs us up with a stranger.  I’d give it zero stars if I could.

developer_response.body: Please try play with friends, instead of PvP for matching with your friends.

reviews.review_description: Zombie cat theme mentioned in description but don't see it anywhere.  I have the paid upgrade and it's still not visible.  Where would I find it?

Not really good for training. It focuses too much on strenght and not on agility and deception. It always tells you to punch harder and doesn't count the blows that have less strenght. But in boxing pretending to launch a devastating blow and actually not doing it is a really strong strategy. It makes the enemy get tired while you are saving up energy. Such an app should be designed so that someone who wants to just do easy movements for hours without getting his hearth rate too high should be able to do it.

You can change your activity with the app. Especially when it's raining or to hot outside.
Could add play all songs or selected in the Boss mode please

developer_response.body: Thats a good idea. Sure we will look into adding play all songs in boss mode.

reviews.review_description: Doesn’t offer refund

developer_response.body:
Sorry Add-ons are no refundable by Meta. Its not us. 
Can i know what problems are you facing, so that we can plan to address them or try to compensate in whatever way we can.

reviews.review_description: I like that idea but I’m going with a more casual look

reviews.review_title: Lopsided scoring. AI gets a lot   more
reviews.review_description: Arrogant developer. Here is your five star. Now please leave me alone.  I do not want you to contact me again ever.    take your crappy A1 and stuff it

developer_response.body:
Hi Crayon,
Just a tip: A unsuccessful duck means the controllers vibrate. Try squatting a little deeper. 
Our AI adjusts to challenge your skills fairly. 
If you feel satisfied with the tip, please consider updating your rating as we are constantly working to improve this Free game.

reviews.review_title: Excercise game, Not a fighting game
reviews.review_description: Really good for excercise, played for an hour tired af, then took a very long nap

developer_response.body:
Wow that nice...
Are you up for a challenge with our best players ??
Join our discord https://discord.gg/NgYUXTtmPH

reviews.review_description: Very good app, daily warm up  with AI and then with a real opponent. it is intensive and feels like a real gym training. I missed the daily scoreboard, but I can see it now, super!
I am 60 and I use this every day to start my day. Love how easy it is to do and stay at it.

developer_response.body:
Thats great. I hope, you are having fun and getting a good workout everyday. 
Feel free to send any feedback our way, for us to improve the game.

reviews.review_title: Great game that is well supported
reviews.review_description: This game is great for exercise and very well supported. New features and improvements keep coming to help me burn calories while having a fun time. Its a bargain compared to some of other higher priced fitness games but no less effective.

developer_response.body:
Thank you VKapoor... Really Appreciate your feedback. 
Please let us know, if you see any areas of improvements or ideas on matches..
You can join our discord at https://discord.gg/NgYUXTtmPH where our team and pro players chat regularly.

reviews.review_description: This is great for your cardio workouts while also having fun competing with other people or the computer. The updates keep adding things to make it more fun for everyone.the new rock crusher challenge is a definite arm workout and shoulder workout, I was feeling it the next day

This game brings something that others don’t, PvP! Being able to play with my friend while breaking a sweat is awesome. After some bugs are fixed I know this will be a 5 star game

UPDATE: I first gave this game 4 stars due to its potential but now, i think it has earned its 5th star. This game is one of the best workout apps out there. It is simple yet effective and I can’t wait to see how it grows from here

developer_response.body: Thank you so much KaleahVR. Really appreciate it.

reviews.review_description:
This is honestly such a great boxing vr app/game. The devs are constantly updating and listening to player feedback. It’s come a long way from when it first started. This is a great PvP type boxing game. You can get your competitive feat on when getting matched with other players live which is something that seems to be missing with other fitness apps. 

A great app to get your body moving!

Well done guys!! Can’t wait to see where this goes!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much M155YU. Really appreciate it

reviews.review_title: Great workout, still needs some fixes
reviews.review_description: Great sweat builder and gets the heart rate up! Music could be way better but not a game killer. Tournament is a great idea had 1 game with opponent playing all the way through and I had a great score but next 2 quit and screwed me out of the tournament because even though your opponent quits the match counts as one of your 3. Tournament could be a great way to get the daily workout players but not set the way it is. Hope to see some changes made but I'm in!!

developer_response.body: Thank you RedBeardedMF. We fixed the issue you faced with opponent leaving in the middle of the match in tournament, please update the app to latest, please do participate in the next tournaments. We will strive to get that 5th star.

reviews.review_title: I need help with the app.
reviews.review_description: Love the app but how do i get my score to save, just upgraded to pro but its still not saving my information and just sticks on the screen when time is up.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the love.
Can you please email us to better fix this issue.
On initial glance, it appears that your score is not saved on Leaderboards. Is that the issue ? 
Please email us at shirish@challengebox.app
